home.description: Test your knowledge and keep improving with each challenge.

quizzes.title: Interactive Quizzes
quizzes.description: Practice and reinforce your fundamental knowledge with quizzes covering reactivity, the Composition API, and ecosystem tools.

challenges.title: Technical Challenges
challenges.description: Hands-on coding problems ranging from state management bugs to performance optimization tasks.

tips.title: A collection of Vue tips
tips.description: Vuecito gives you a daily dose of Vue.js wisdom, from hidden features to best practices, all in a fun and engaging format.

call_to_action.title: Want to take some time to practice
call_to_action.description: Try a few quizzes and challenges to test your knowledge and keep learning.

home.title: Your learning space

continue.title: Continue with Vue 3

firefox_message.title: Firefox Issues
firefox_message.message_1: StackBlitz uses WebContainers technology, which is not fully compatible with Firefox when embedded in an iframe.
firefox_message.message_2: If you experience issues running the code, try one of these options:
firefox_message.option_1: Click on Fork on StackBlitz to generate your own copy of the code.
firefox_message.option_2: Use a Chromium-based browser like Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge.
firefox_message.option_3: Download the code and run it on your local machine.
